content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://whatweknow.inequality.cornell.edu/topics/what-does-the-scholarly-research-say-about-whether-raising-the-minimum-wage-negatively-impacts-employment/", "source_title": "What does the scholarly research say about whether raising the ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Our Work We conducted a systematic literature review of peer-reviewed articles published in the U.S. between 2004 and 2019 that assess the e...", "direct_quote": "Our Work We conducted a systematic literature review of peer-reviewed articles published in the U.S. between 2004 and 2019 that assess the effect of raising the minimum wage on employment.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Eight (8) studies showed mixed or inconclusive results.", "direct_quote": "Eight (8) studies showed mixed or inconclusive results.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In recent empirical studies, minimum wage raises do not appear to substantially lower employment, with many studies reporting employment eff...", "direct_quote": "In recent empirical studies, minimum wage raises do not appear to substantially lower employment, with many studies reporting employment effects indistinguishable from zero or random noise. 2.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
